purpose_context: Without session presence, AI agents initialized with spec-kitty have no awareness of the tool or how to route requests. This mission builds a new session_presence package that writes idempotent orientation blocks to each agent's native config on init and upgrade, covering all 19 supported harnesses across two phases: Claude Code first (Phase 1, issue #1760), then all remaining harnesses (Phase 2, issue #1761).
purpose_tldr: Automatically inject Spec Kitty orientation into every configured AI agent's config files so agents know what Spec Kitty is and how to use it.
